HGSS.487.0000:
Hello! Welcome to the Celadon
Department Store!\f
The directory is on the wall next to
the elevator.
HGSS.487.0001:
This department store is part of the
same chain as the one in Goldenrod City.\f
They were both renovated at the
same time.
HGSS.487.0002:
This is my first time here.
It’s so big...\r
I’m afraid I’ll get lost.
